 {'date': '2026-02-25 14:47:58',
  'headline': 'Angel Oak Mortgage (AOMR) Earnings Transcript',
  'publisher': 'Motley Fool',
  'summary': 'Sreeniwas Vikram Prabhu: Thank you, KC, and thank you all for '
             'joining us today.  GAAP book value per share increased year over '
             'year due to improving valuations in our legacy securitizations '
             'as rates move lower as well as high net interest income '
             'supported by our deployment of capital into high-yielding '
             'investments.  The broader interest rate environment in 2025 was '
             'characterized in general by decreasing rates across the curve '
             'and over the course of the year, amid shifting expectations '
             'around the pace and the path of short-term rates.',
  'url': 'https://www.fool.com/earnings/call-transcripts/2026/02/25/angel-oak-mortgage-aomr-earnings-transcript/'},
